# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

apiVersion: envoy.io/v2
kind: EnvoyConfiguration
type: cluster
name: edge-proxy

networkFilters:
  filters:
    - name: access_log
      typedExtension:
        config:
          factory: access_log.filter.Factory
          streamDescriptor:
            name: accessLog
            transportSocket:
              name: TCP_NO_DELAY
              params:
                socketOptions:
                  sockopt_TCP_NODELAY: 1

admin:
  accessLogFile: stdout
  address:
    socketAddress:
      address: localhost
      portValue: 19000

stats:
  aggregateRequestHeaders: true
  dumpResponseHeaderDuringSnapshots: true
  aggregatedRequestTelemetry:
    codecFamily: HTTP_3
    streamDescriptor:
      name: snapshots_requests_http3
      transportSocket:
        name: TCP_NO_DELAY
        params:
          socketOptions:
            sockopt_TCP_NODELAY: 1

  listeners:
  - name: admin
    address:
      socketAddress:
        address: localhost
        portValue: 9901
    filterChains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.http.router
        typedConfig: {}
      - name: access_log
        typedConfig: {}
      - name: envoy.filters.transport.tls
        typedConfig:
          transportSocket:
            commonTLSContextName: edge-proxy-common-tls-context
